title: Gateway Soak And Memory Trend
objective: Run a gateway for a longer window with repeated user-facing checks to detect memory growth, event-loop stalls, and degraded responsiveness.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the target runtime and capture baseline status.

phases.title: Repeated User Checks
phases.intent: Repeat status, plugin list, model list, and health checks while tracking memory and latency.
